untranslatable_reason: Signal requires deviation from moving average measured in standard deviations (Bollinger Band style), but no standard-deviation-based indicator is available in the allowed list. Bollinger Bands (bb_upper, bb_lower) exist but cannot be parameterized with custom periods and thresholds. Signal also contains multiple [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] placeholders that lack concrete values.
translation_notes: Attempted simplified mean-reversion logic using SMA crossovers as proxy, but this does not capture the core signal requirement of deviation thresholds measured in standard deviations. Original signal requires Bollinger Bands or similar volatility-adjusted bands with configurable parameters that are not available.
